items.prompt: Classic pin wiggle in a directed TB maps most closely to…
items.explain: Procedural pin writes become a reusable driver behind a virtual interface.

items.prompt: Hard-coded stimulus vectors map most closely to…
items.explain: Sequences generate items; the sequencer feeds the driver instead of nested tasks.

items.prompt: The tb-vs-uvm-map browser lab runs a real UVM library simulation.
items.explain: It is a concept map for literacy, not a UVM runtime.

items.prompt: Inline expect checks in a flat TB map most closely to…
items.explain: Checks move to transaction-level predict versus actual on items.

items.prompt: The starter example in this lab uses…
choices: UART transmit with pin drive already mapped
items.explain: Starter loads UART TX with pin-drive ↔ driver bridge selected.
